properties.name: numericPoolScope
properties.title: POOL SCOPE (GROUP ID)
properties.description: Scope that scopes this pool to your group — use your activity group ID

properties.name: numericPoolName
properties.title: POOL NAME
properties.description: Name for the new numeric resource pool (include your group number)

properties.name: poolDescription
properties.title: POOL DESCRIPTION
properties.description: Optional description for the pool (e.g. 'vlan-id pool')

properties.name: minValue
properties.title: MIN VALUE
properties.description: Minimum numeric value in the pool range (inclusive)

properties.name: maxValue
properties.title: MAX VALUE
properties.description: Maximum numeric value in the pool range (inclusive)

properties.name: thresholdWarning
properties.title: WARNING THRESHOLD (%)
properties.description: Pool utilization % at which a warning alarm is raised

properties.name: thresholdMinor
properties.title: MINOR THRESHOLD (%)
properties.description: Pool utilization % at which a minor alarm is raised

properties.name: thresholdMajor
properties.title: MAJOR THRESHOLD (%)
properties.description: Pool utilization % at which a major alarm is raised
